Notice Of Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As Swanson Tool Company
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David H. Williams (510.271.0826) for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS SWANSON TOOL COMPANY is granted. Settlement complies with H & S section 25249.7 (f)(4). Order and judgment signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Or Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Cobra Products Inc And Masco Corporation
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and or Entry of Consent Judgment as To Cobra Products Inc. and Masco Corporation. Appearances: Fredric Evenson, Esq. Law Office of Fredic Evenson appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, no opposition filed and settlement meets requirements of H&S section 25249.7(f). Order & Judgment signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
